title: hieracium murorum subsp. pleuroleucum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pleuroleucum, commonly known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
